message:
fix(tui): update 7 test assertions for banner lines, picker modals, and sort cycle

Tests were out of sync with recent rendering changes: main list now
prepends banner lines (Focus/Scope/Guide), label/repo picker uses
character keys for filter input, sort cycle includes PageRank and
Blockers modes, history Tab focus cycles 2-step without detail pane.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
